inputs.label: Register Tons
inputs.businessContext: Volume in register tons (1 RT = 100 cubic feet)

businessContext_i18n.en: Volume in register tons (1 RT = 100 cubic feet)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kayıt tonu cinsinden hacim (1 RT = 100 fit küp)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Volume en tonnes de registre (1 TR = 100 pieds cubes)
businessContext_i18n.es: Volumen en toneladas de registro (1 TR = 100 pies cúbicos)

inputs.label: Cubic Meters
inputs.businessContext: Volume in cubic meters (for reverse conversion)

businessContext_i18n.en: Volume in cubic meters (for reverse conversion)
businessContext_i18n.fr: Volume en mètres cubes (pour conversion inverse)
businessContext_i18n.es: Volumen en metros cúbicos (para conversión inversa)

inputs.label: Conversion Direction
inputs.businessContext: Select direction: 0 for register tons to cubic meters, 1 for cubic meters to register tons

businessContext_i18n.en: Select direction: 0 for register tons to cubic meters, 1 for cubic meters to register tons
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yön seçin: 0 kayıt tondan metreküpe, 1 metreküpten kayıt tona
businessContext_i18n.de: Richtung wählen: 0 für Registertonnen in Kubikmeter, 1 für Kubikmeter in Registertonnen
businessContext_i18n.fr: Sélectionnez la direction : 0 pour tonnes de registre en mètres cubes, 1 pour mètres cubes en tonnes de registre
businessContext_i18n.es: Seleccione dirección: 0 para toneladas de registro a metros cúbicos, 1 para metros cúbicos a toneladas de registro

inputs.label: Decimal Places
inputs.businessContext: Number of decimal places for rounding result

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of decimal places for rounding result
businessContext_i18n.tr: Sonucu yuvarlamak için ondalık basamak sayısı
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Dezimalstellen für das gerundete Ergebnis
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre de décimales pour l'arrondi du résultat
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de decimales para redondear el resultado

inputs.label: Use Standard Factor
inputs.businessContext: Use standard conversion factor (2.8316846592 m³/RT) if 1, else custom

businessContext_i18n.en: Use standard conversion factor (2.8316846592 m³/RT) if 1, else custom
businessContext_i18n.tr: Standart dönüşüm faktörü (2,8316846592 m³/RT) kullanılıyorsa 1, aksi halde özel
businessContext_i18n.de: Standard-Umrechnungsfaktor (2,8316846592 m³/RT) verwenden, wenn 1, sonst benutzerdefiniert
businessContext_i18n.fr: Utiliser le facteur de conversion standard (2,8316846592 m³/TR) si 1, sinon personnalisé
businessContext_i18n.es: Usar factor de conversión estándar (2.8316846592 m³/TR) si es 1, si no, personalizado

inputs.label: Custom Factor
inputs.businessContext: Custom conversion factor when not using standard. Default is standard factor.

businessContext_i18n.en: Custom conversion factor when not using standard. Default is standard factor.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Standart kullanılmadığında özel dönüşüm faktörü. Varsayılan standart faktördür.
businessContext_i18n.de: Benutzerdefinierter Umrechnungsfaktor, wenn nicht der Standard verwendet wird. Standard ist der Standardfaktor.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de conversion personnalisé lorsque le facteur standard n'est pas utilisé. La valeur par défaut est le facteur standard.
businessContext_i18n.es: Factor de conversión personalizado cuando no se usa el estándar. El valor predeterminado es el factor estándar.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
